# ona_groups (Data Source)

List Gitpod groups in the organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "ona_groups" "all" {}

data "ona_groups" "engineering" {
  filter {
    name   = "name"
    values = ["Engineering"]
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `filter` (Block List) Filter groups. Supported filter names: `name`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--filter))

### Read-Only

- `groups` (Attributes List) Groups in the organization. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--groups))

<a id="nestedblock--filter"></a>
### Nested Schema for `filter`

Required:

- `name` (String) Name of the field to filter by.
- `values` (List of String) Values to match against. A group matches if the field equals any of the values.


<a id="nestedatt--groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `groups`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the group was created.
- `description` (String) Group description.
- `direct_share` (Boolean) Whether the group uses direct sharing.
- `id` (String) Group ID.
- `member_count` (Number) Number of members in the group.
- `name` (String) Group name.
- `organization_id` (String) Organization ID the group belongs to.
- `system_managed` (Boolean) Whether the group is system-managed.
- `updated_at` (String) Timestamp when the group was last updated.
